PLASTIC_BARREL_DESCRIPTION: A lightweight plastic barrel suitable for basic storage and fermentation.
STEEL_BARREL_DESCRIPTION: A durable steel barrel resistant to pressure and long-term use.
OAK_BARREL_DESCRIPTION: A traditional oak barrel that enhances flavor during aging.
BEECH_BARREL_DESCRIPTION: A sturdy beech barrel used for controlled fermentation processes.
ACACIA_BARREL_DESCRIPTION: An acacia wood barrel known for adding unique aroma notes.
PRESSING_STATION_DESCRIPTION: A station used to press raw materials before fermentation or processing.
YEAST_DESCRIPTION: A standard fermentation ingredient used in basic production.
PREMIUM_YEAST_DESCRIPTION: High-quality yeast that improves fermentation efficiency and output.
TURBO_YEAST_DESCRIPTION: Fast-acting yeast designed for rapid fermentation cycles.
PECTINASE_DESCRIPTION: A key ingredient used to feed yeast during fermentation.
EMPTY_BOTTLE_DESCRIPTION: An empty bottle used to store finished products.
WOOD_PLANK_DESCRIPTION: Processed wood material used for crafting and construction.
METAL_PLATE_DESCRIPTION: A reinforced metal component used in structural builds.
NAILS_DESCRIPTION: Basic fastening materials used for assembling wooden structures.
YEAST_SUCCESSFULLY_ADDED: You have successfully added %s to the barrel.
PECTINASE_SUCCESSFULLY_ADDED: You have successfully added the pectinase!

BARREL_ADD_PECTINASE_DESCRIPTION: Reduces quality but significantly improves condition. Can only be used at low fermentation progress.

BARREL_ADD_PREMIUM_YEAST_DESCRIPTION: Slightly reduces quality while increasing condition and supporting fermentation.
